data.name: 綺羅的淫亂人生
data.detailed_description:
◆故事


全天下的男人，都是一樣的生物。
他們以為覆在我身上，進入我的身體，就是擁有了我，我就會依賴他們。
恰好相反。



我可以在床上浪蕩呻吟，可以迎合各種喜好，可以在他們耳際吐息耳語，說我是你的唯一。
然而這只是一場遊戲罷了。一場你給我我想要的東西，我便滿足你的慾望去等價交換的遊戲。
而我從來不覺得這有什麼錯。

白梨——我唯一的朋友，始終無法理解我，卻也始終沒有離開我。
這個世界上，只有她一個人真心對我好。
即便她的神態中，總是流露出欲言又止的樣子。



當我順利進入政府單位，認識了政商名流、青年才俊，一遍遍的利益交換遊戲中，我應該是逐步在靠近我想要的生活才對，只是為什麼我卻感覺越來越空虛，週遭的世界也越來越混濁呢？

這樣各取所需的利益遊戲也逐漸失去了控制，本能隨心所欲的淫蕩生活開始脫離我的掌控……

◆玩法


遊戲為第一人稱視角AVG，玩家將扮演女主角綺羅，在不同的男人間周旋。
遊戲中有多次選項，每一次選項都會影響身邊角色們對女主角的想法，進而影響最終的結局。
在每一天入睡前都可以給一名角色傳簡訊博取好感，更能選擇思考來獲得接下來選擇的提示。
而這些看似普通的選擇，也可能帶領玩家開啟另外一種看故事的視角，通往新世界的大門。

◆遊戲特色


◇17張基本CG，包含差分200張以上
◇遊戲文字9萬5千字
◇一位主要女角，一位次要女角
◇遊戲結局：7種

data.short_description: 美麗的花朵，往往帶著刺。外型姣好的綺羅為了追尋自己想要的一切，一遍遍和不同的男人「各取所需」，只要有人需要她且能給予她，她就能獻給男人他們渴望的一切，除了心……
data.supported_languages:
繁體中文, 英文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 泰文, 簡體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 越南文, 韓文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 512 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Qi Luo’s Erotic Life
data.detailed_description:
◆Story


All the men in the world are the same creatures.
They think they own me by covering my body and that I depend on them.
It is the opposite.



I can either moan on the bed or whisper “I am only for you” into their ears to satisfy their needs.
Yet it is just a game. It is a fair game in which I seek what I want from you by satisfying your desires.
And I never thought it was wrong.

Bai Li, my only friend, who never could understand me, never left me.

In this world, she is the only one who treats me sincerely.
Even though she often appears to be hesitant to say something.



When I successfully entered the government agencies, I got to know many celebrities in government and business and talented youth. After repeated exchange games for interests, I should be gradually approaching the life I want, but why do I now feel I’m more and more empty and that the world around me is becoming worse and worse?

This game of taking what I want is gradually losing control and the instinct to do whatever I want with my lustful life is starting to get out of control ......

◆ Gameplay


This is a first-person adventure game (AVG) in which the player takes the role of Qi Luo, the heroine, to deal with different men.
There are many choices in the game. Every choice will influence other roles’ opinions of the heroine, affecting the final ending.
Every day, before going to sleep, you can send a text message to a character to gain favor, and you can choose to think to get the next tips.
Moreover, those seemingly ordinary choices can also bring players a new perspective to view the story and discover a new world.

◆ Game Features


◇ 17 basic CG, including 200 differential graphics
◇Game text: 95,000 words
◇ One main heroine, one minor heroine
◇Game ending: 7 types

data.short_description: Every beautiful flower has its thorns. In pursuit of what she wants, the good-figured Qi Luo can satisfy all needs, except her heart, of different men as long as they need her and can meet her needs. In Qi Luo’s opinion, such a deed is called “needs for needs”.
data.supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese, English, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Thai, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Vietnamese, Korean, Japanese*
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 512 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
